column1: sentence
Pikachu stores electricity inside the small pouches on its cheeks.
Raichu can release stronger electric shocks after Pikachu evolves with a Thunder Stone.
Charmander has a flame on its tail that shows its life force.
Charmeleon becomes more aggressive before it finally evolves into Charizard.
Charizard can fly through the sky after Charmander reaches its final evolution.
Bulbasaur carries a plant bulb on its back from birth.
Ivysaur grows a heavier plant that makes standing on two legs difficult.
Venusaur spreads a sweet scent from the flower on its back.
Squirtle withdraws into its shell before spraying water at opponents.
Wartortle has fluffy ears and a tail that symbolize long life.
Blastoise fires powerful water blasts from the cannons on its shell.
Caterpie can evolve into Butterfree through a short early game evolution line.
Weedle carries a sharp poison stinger on its head.
Pidgey prefers avoiding fights by kicking up sand with its wings.
Rattata constantly gnaws hard objects to keep its teeth short.
Spearow flies poorly at long distances but attacks fiercely with its beak.
Ekans can silently slither through grass while hunting smaller Pokemon.
Sandshrew curls into a ball to protect its soft belly.
Nidorina cannot breed after evolving from Nidoran Female.
Nidorino uses its large horn to deliver poisonous strikes.
Clefairy became a Fairy type after the type was introduced.
Vulpix has six beautiful tails before evolving into Ninetales.
Ninetales is often linked with legends about a very long lifespan.
Jigglypuff is famous for singing opponents into sleep.
Zubat lives in dark caves and avoids bright sunlight.
Oddish hides underground during the day and walks around at night.
Paras carries mushrooms that grow larger as it evolves.
Venonat has large compound eyes that help it search at night.
Diglett spends most of its life hidden beneath the ground.
Alolan Diglett has metallic whiskers shaped by volcanic soil.
Meowth loves shiny coins and learns Pay Day naturally.
Psyduck suffers headaches that sometimes trigger powerful psychic energy.
Mankey becomes angry very quickly and attacks with surprising speed.
Growlithe is known as a loyal Pokemon that guards its Trainer.
Arcanine is admired in Kanto for its majestic speed and grace.
Poliwag has a visible spiral pattern on its soft belly.
Abra often teleports away immediately when surprised in the wild.
Kadabra carries a spoon that helps focus its psychic power.
Alakazam has extremely high intelligence and remembers many things.
Machop trains its body by lifting heavy rocks and boulders.
Machoke wears a power saving belt to control its strength.
Bellsprout has thin roots that help it absorb moisture from soil.
Tentacool drifts through the sea with tentacles trailing below.
Geodude is often mistaken for an ordinary rock on mountain paths.
Ponyta can jump very high after strengthening its legs.
Galarian Ponyta has a colorful mane and a Psychic typing.
Slowpoke can evolve when another Pokemon bites its tail or arm.
Magnemite floats by using magnetism instead of wings.
Farfetchd carries a plant stalk that it uses like a weapon.
Doduo runs fast despite having two heads and no visible wings.
Seel loves cold seas and balances a horn on its head.
Grimer was first discovered in sludge and polluted places.
Alolan Grimer has bright colors because it eats unusual waste.
Shellder evolves into Cloyster when exposed to a Water Stone.
Gastly is mostly made of gas and haunts dark places.
Gengar hides in shadows and is known for sudden chills.
Onix tunnels underground with a long body made of boulders.
Drowzee is based on a dream eating creature from folklore.
Krabby raises its large pincers when it feels threatened.
Voltorb looks like a Poke Ball and often surprises Trainers.
Exeggcute is a group of six seedlike bodies acting together.
Cubone wears the skull of its mother on its head.
Hitmonlee specializes in long kicks with legs that stretch.
Hitmonchan throws fast punches inspired by a professional boxer.
Lickitung uses its long tongue to explore unfamiliar objects.
Koffing releases toxic gas from chemicals inside its body.
Rhyhorn can charge forward with great power but poor turning skill.
Chansey carries a nutritious egg that it shares with injured Pokemon.
Tangela hides its true shape beneath thick blue vines.
Kangaskhan protects the baby carried in its pouch.
Horsea spits ink to escape when larger foes approach.
Staryu can regenerate damaged arms if its core remains safe.
Mr Mime creates invisible walls through skilled pantomime.
Scyther slices through grass with sharp scythe shaped arms.
Jynx communicates through dance like movements and strange cries.
Electabuzz often gathers near places struck by lightning.
Magmar lives near volcanic areas and has a body like fire.
Pinsir grips opponents with the huge horns on its head.
Tauros charges wildly when it whips itself with its tails.
Magikarp is weak at first but eventually evolves into Gyarados.
Gyarados becomes fearsome after Magikarp completes its dramatic evolution.
Lapras became protected after once being heavily overhunted.
Ditto can transform into other Pokemon and breed with many species.
Eevee has more evolved forms than any other Pokemon.
Vaporeon evolves from Eevee when exposed to a Water Stone.
Jolteon evolves from Eevee when exposed to a Thunder Stone.
Flareon evolves from Eevee when exposed to a Fire Stone.
Espeon evolves from Eevee through friendship during the daytime.
Umbreon evolves from Eevee through friendship during the nighttime.
Leafeon and Glaceon later gained stone based evolution methods.
Sylveon evolves from Eevee through friendship while knowing a Fairy move.
Porygon was created with computer programming instead of natural biology.
Omanyte and Kabuto can be revived from ancient fossils.
Aerodactyl is revived from Old Amber in the Kanto games.
Snorlax often blocks roads until someone wakes it.
Articuno is a Legendary bird associated with ice and snow.
Zapdos is a Legendary bird associated with thunder and storms.
Moltres is a Legendary bird associated with blazing fire.
Dratini grows by repeatedly shedding its skin as it gets larger.
Dragonair is said to change weather with the orbs on its body.
Dragonite can fly across the sea with surprising speed.
Mewtwo was created after experiments involving the mythical Pokemon Mew.
Mew is said to contain the genetic information of all Pokemon.
Chikorita waves the leaf on its head to check temperature and humidity.
Bayleef releases a spicy scent from the leaves around its neck.
Meganium can soothe aggressive feelings with the aroma from its petals.
Cyndaquil protects itself by igniting flames along its back.
Quilava keeps enemies away with flames and quick movements.
Typhlosion can create explosive heat when its anger rises.
Totodile bites everything playfully because its jaws are very strong.
Croconaw has teeth that curve backward and stay hard to remove.
Feraligatr intimidates foes by opening its huge mouth wide.
Sentret stands on its tail to look over tall grass.
Noctowl can rotate its head to see in many directions.
Ledyba communicates with others by releasing scented fluids.
Spinarak spins sticky threads to trap prey in forests.
Crobat evolves from Golbat when friendship becomes high.
Chinchou uses its glowing antennae to lure prey underwater.
Pichu may hurt itself when it stores too much electricity.
Igglybuff has a soft body that bounces when it moves.
Togepi stores happiness inside its shell according to old stories.
Natu hops around because its wings are not strong yet.
Mareep stores static electricity in its fluffy wool.
Bellossom evolves from Gloom when exposed to a Sun Stone.
Sudowoodo looks like a tree but dislikes water.
Aipom uses its tail like a hand for climbing trees.
Yanma can look in every direction with its large eyes.
Quagsire often bumps into boats because it swims without much concern.
Misdreavus frightens people by crying like a person at night.
Wobbuffet mainly fights by countering attacks from opponents.
Pineco hangs from trees while waiting for prey to pass.
Gligar glides between cliffs using membranes under its arms.
Snubbull looks fierce but is often timid around people.
Scizor evolves from Scyther through trading with a Metal Coat.
Heracross loves sweet tree sap and uses its horn for strength.
Ursaring can find food by smelling the ground carefully.
Swinub searches through snow with its sensitive nose.
Remoraid sprays water with impressive accuracy from its mouth.
Mantine swims elegantly with Remoraid sometimes attached beneath its fins.
Houndour hunts in packs and uses different cries to communicate.
Phanpy uses its long nose to shower itself with water.
Smeargle marks territory by painting with fluid from its tail.
Smoochum touches objects with its lips to learn about them.
Magby breathes hot flames when its body temperature rises.
Blissey shares eggs filled with happiness and kindness.
Suicune is a Legendary beast associated with pure water.
Tyranitar is so powerful that maps may change after its rampages.
Ho Oh is said to appear with a rainbow colored trail.
Treecko climbs walls with tiny hooks on its feet.
Sceptile has seeds on its back that can nourish trees.
Combusken strengthens its legs through running across fields and mountains.
Mudkip senses water movements with the fin on its head.
Swampert can predict storms by sensing subtle wave changes.
Galarian Zigzagoon is said to be the original form of Zigzagoon.
Ludicolo becomes energetic when it hears cheerful music.
Ralts senses emotions with the red horns on its head.
Gardevoir can protect its Trainer with intense psychic power.
Surskit skates across water by releasing oil from its feet.
Breloom stretches its arms quickly to throw powerful punches.
Vigoroth becomes restless and struggles to stay still.
Nincada lives underground and absorbs nutrients from tree roots.
Whismur cries loudly enough to startle nearby people.
Exploud has many tubes that amplify its powerful voice.
Hariyama uses open palm strikes with tremendous force.
Skitty chases moving objects and sometimes spins after its own tail.
Mawile deceives foes with a huge jawlike set of horns.
Aggron fiercely protects the mountains where it lives.
Manectric creates thunderclouds with sparks from its mane.
Minun cheers for partners by releasing bright electrical sparks.
Illumise leads groups of Volbeat to create glowing designs.
Gulpin has a stomach that can digest almost anything.
Wailmer bounces like a ball when it fills with air.
Spoink bounces constantly because stopping would affect its heartbeat.
Trapinch waits in sand pits that make escape difficult.
Altaria has soft cloudlike wings and sings with a clear voice.
Seviper sharpens its swordlike tail for battles with Zangoose.
Solrock absorbs sunlight and can glow with solar energy.
Corphish came from overseas and adapted to many waters.
Lileep can be revived from a Root Fossil.
Feebas can evolve into Milotic through beauty or a Prism Scale.
Kecleon changes body color but keeps its belly stripe visible.
Duskull can pass through walls and enjoys dark places.
Chimecho uses wind to float and create echoing cries.
Wynaut likes gathering with others in caves at night.
Relicanth has remained nearly unchanged for an extremely long time.
Bagon dreams of flying and repeatedly jumps from cliffs.
Beldum floats by using magnetic force between its cells.
Regirock can repair itself with rocks from nearby places.
Registeel has a body harder than any ordinary metal.
Latios can share what it sees with others through images.
Groudon is linked with expanding the land in Hoenn mythology.
Jirachi is a Mythical Pokemon said to awaken for only short periods.
Turtwig makes energy through photosynthesis on sunny days.
Torterra can resemble a moving landscape with trees on its back.
Infernape fights with fiery martial arts and great agility.
Prinplup lives alone because every Prinplup believes it is the most important.
Starly gathers in flocks and makes loud cries.
Shinx has muscles that generate electricity when they flex.
Budew opens its bud when sunlight becomes strong enough.
Cranidos is revived from a Skull Fossil in Sinnoh.
Burmy changes its cloak depending on where it last battled.
Pachirisu stores electricity in fur balls on its cheeks.
Cherubi gets nutrients from the small ball beside it.
Ambipom uses two tails like hands after evolving from Aipom.
Mismagius chants mysterious cries that can cause strange effects.
Glameow curls its springlike tail when it feels pleased.
Bronzor was first found in ancient tombs by researchers.
Mime Jr copies the movements of people and Pokemon.
Chatot can mimic human words with its musical cry.
Gible nests in small holes and attacks anything that passes nearby.
Riolu senses emotions through mysterious waves called aura.
Hippopotas stores sand inside its body and releases it from nostrils.
Croagunk has poison sacs hidden inside its cheeks.
Finneon attracts attention with bright patterns on its tail fins.
Snover grows berries that look like frozen treats around its belly.
Weavile hunts in groups and leaves marks on trees.
Rhyperior can launch rocks from holes in its palms.
Electivire can produce enough electricity to power a large city.
Togekiss avoids conflict and appears where people respect each other.
Gliscor glides silently through the night and attacks from above.
Froslass is said to be born from a woman lost in snowy mountains.
Uxie is known as the being of knowledge in Sinnoh myths.
Azelf is known as the being of willpower in Sinnoh myths.
Giratina is associated with the mysterious Distortion World.
Darkrai can cause nightmares but is not always malicious.
Arceus is described in Sinnoh myths as the first Pokemon.
Professor Elm is known for researching Pokemon breeding.
Professor Rowan studies Pokemon evolution in the Sinnoh region.
Misty leads the Cerulean Gym and specializes in Water type Pokemon.
Erika leads the Celadon Gym and specializes in Grass type Pokemon.
Sabrina leads the Saffron Gym and specializes in Psychic type Pokemon.
Lance is famous for using Dragon type Pokemon.
Steven Stone loves rare stones and serves as a Hoenn Champion.
Nemona loves battling and serves as a friendly rival in Paldea.
Silver begins as a harsh rival in the Johto games.
Barry rushes everywhere as the energetic rival from Sinnoh.
Team Rocket often uses Poison type and Normal type Pokemon.
Team Magma favors Fire type and Ground type Pokemon in Hoenn.
Team Plasma uses medieval styling in the Unova games.
Team Yell loudly supports a favorite Trainer in Galar.
Viridian Forest introduces many Trainers to Bug type Pokemon.
Goldenrod City has a large department store and radio tower.
Littleroot Town is the starting hometown in Hoenn.
Jubilife City hosts the Poketch company in Sinnoh.
Lumiose City has a tall tower and many cafes in Kalos.
Motostoke is a busy industrial city in Galar.
Pokemon Centers heal tired teams for free in every main region.
Poke Marts sell useful items like Potions and Poke Balls.
Pokemon Eggs hatch after Trainers walk enough steps.
Trading allows some Pokemon to evolve into stronger forms.
The Master Ball never fails when used on a wild Pokemon.
Ultra Balls offer stronger capture performance than Great Balls.
Dusk Balls work better in caves and at night.
Luxury Balls help caught Pokemon gain friendship more quickly.
Rare Candy raises a Pokemon by exactly one level.
Escape Rope helps Trainers leave caves and dungeons quickly.
Oran Berries restore a small amount of health in battle.
Pecha Berries cure poison when held or used.
Leppa Berries restore move power points when they run low.
HMs once taught field moves needed for exploration.
Fly allows quick travel between towns after being unlocked.
Strength once moved heavy boulders during cave exploration.
Flamethrower is a classic Fire type move that may burn foes.
Solar Beam usually charges first before striking with sunlight.
Protect shields a Pokemon from many attacks for one turn.
Sing can put opposing Pokemon to sleep during battle.
Swift never misses in many mainline Pokemon games.
Intimidate lowers the opponents attack when the Pokemon enters battle.
Overgrow boosts Grass type moves when health becomes low.
Torrent boosts Water type moves when health becomes low.
Drizzle starts rain when the Pokemon enters battle.
Sand Stream summons a sandstorm when the Pokemon enters battle.
Harsh sunlight strengthens Fire type moves and weakens Water type moves.
Electric type moves cannot affect Ground type Pokemon in normal conditions.
Dragon type moves are not very effective against Steel type Pokemon.
Steel type Pokemon resist many attack types in battle.
Ice type moves are super effective against Dragon Flying Grass and Ground types.
Status moves can change stats or conditions without dealing direct damage.
Double battles let each Trainer use two Pokemon at once.
Rotation battles appeared in Unova with a rotating three Pokemon field.
Z Moves let Trainers unleash one special powered move in Alola.
Terastallizing changes or strengthens a Pokemon typing in Paldea.
Regional forms show how Pokemon adapt to different environments.
Alolan Raichu rides its tail and gains a Psychic typing.
Galarian Weezing has chimney like heads and a Fairy typing.
Hisuian Zorua is a Normal and Ghost type Pokemon.
Froakie creates bubbles that protect its body during battle.
Greninja can create throwing stars made of compressed water.
Fennekin carries a twig and releases heat from its ears.
Chespin has a tough shell that protects its head and back.
Rowlet can fly silently and attacks with sharp leaves.
Litten produces flammable hairballs by carefully grooming itself.
Popplio makes water balloons through practice and playful training.
Grookey uses its stick to create rhythms that energize plants.
Scorbunny warms up by running and kicking pebbles around.
Sobble becomes nearly invisible when it touches water.
Sprigatito releases a sweet scent from its paws.
Fuecoco lies on warm rocks and absorbs heat through its scales.
Quaxly keeps its glossy feathers neat with careful grooming.
Miraidon and Koraidon represent different travel styles in Paldea.
